SEARCH
Package controller

Klasse PlayerController

java.lang.Object
controller.PlayerController
public class PlayerController extends Object
Utility controller class that provides static methods for creating and managing Player objects.

This class acts as an interface between the application logic and the Player model. It contains methods for player creation, movement, equipment management, inventory access, and retrieval of player attributes.

Seit:
2026
Autor:
Bastian Rentzsch

    static void
    turnLeft(Player player)
    Rotates the player 90 degrees to the left.
    static void
    turnRight(Player player)
    Rotates the player 90 degrees to the right.
    static void
    unequip(Player player, EquipmentSlot slot)
    Removes the currently equipped item from the specified equipment slot.

    Von Klasse geerbte Methoden java.lang.Object

    equals, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Methodendetails

    • createNewPlayer

      public static Player createNewPlayer(String name, String gender, Game game)
      Creates a new player with default attributes and starter items.

      The player is initialized with predefined health, damage, level, gender, and the current game's dungeon. Additionally, several test items are added to the player's inventory.

      Parameter:
      name - the player's name
      gender - the player's gender used for sprite selection
      game - the current game instance
      Gibt zurück:
      the newly created Player

    • getName

      public static String getName(Player player)
      Returns the player's name.
      Parameter:
      player - the player
      Gibt zurück:
      the player's name

    • getMaxHealth

      public static int getMaxHealth(Player player)
      Returns the player's maximum health.
      Parameter:
      player - the player
      Gibt zurück:
      the maximum health value

    • getHealth

      public static int getHealth(Player player)
      Returns the player's current health.
      Parameter:
      player - the player
      Gibt zurück:
      the current health

    • getDamage

      public static int getDamage(Player player)
      Returns the player's current damage value.
      Parameter:
      player - the player
      Gibt zurück:
      the damage value

    • getDefense

      public static int getDefense(Player player)
      Returns the player's current defense value.
      Parameter:
      player - the player
      Gibt zurück:
      the defense value

    • getImagepath

      public static String getImagepath(Player player)
      Returns the file path of the player's sprite image.
      Parameter:
      player - the player
      Gibt zurück:
      the relative image path

    • getConsumables

      public static List<Item> getConsumables(Player player)
      Returns all consumable items currently stored in the player's inventory.
      Parameter:
      player - the player
      Gibt zurück:
      a list of consumable items

    • getX

      public static int getX(Player player)
      Returns the player's current x-coordinate.
      Parameter:
      player - the player
      Gibt zurück:
      the x-coordinate

    • getY

      public static int getY(Player player)
      Returns the player's current y-coordinate.
      Parameter:
      player - the player
      Gibt zurück:
      the y-coordinate

    • getFacing

      public static Direction getFacing(Player player)
      Returns the direction the player is currently facing.
      Parameter:
      player - the player
      Gibt zurück:
      the facing direction

    • getEquipment

      public static Item getEquipment(Player player, EquipmentSlot slot)
      Returns the item equipped in the specified equipment slot.
      Parameter:
      player - the player
      slot - the equipment slot
      Gibt zurück:
      the equipped item, or null if the slot is empty

    • getEquipments

      public static List<Item> getEquipments(Player player, Itemtype type)
      Returns all equipment items of the specified item type that are available in the player's inventory.
      Parameter:
      player - the player
      type - the requested item type
      Gibt zurück:
      a list of matching equipment items

    • getInventory

      public static Set<Map.Entry<Item,Integer>> getInventory(Player player)
      Returns all inventory entries including their quantities.
      Parameter:
      player - the player
      Gibt zurück:
      a set containing all inventory entries

    • getItemFromInventory

      public static Map.Entry<Item,Integer> getItemFromInventory(Player player, String selected)
      Returns the inventory entry for the specified item name.
      Parameter:
      player - the player
      selected - the name of the selected item
      Gibt zurück:
      the matching inventory entry, or null if no item exists

    • equip

      public static void equip(Player player, Item item)
      Equips the specified item.
      Parameter:
      player - the player
      item - the item to equip

    • unequip

      public static void unequip(Player player, EquipmentSlot slot)
      Removes the currently equipped item from the specified equipment slot.
      Parameter:
      player - the player
      slot - the equipment slot to clear

    • move

      public static void move(Player player, Direction dir)
      Moves the player one tile in the specified direction.
      Parameter:
      player - the player
      dir - the movement direction

    • turnLeft

      public static void turnLeft(Player player)
      Rotates the player 90 degrees to the left.
      Parameter:
      player - the player

    • turnRight

      public static void turnRight(Player player)
      Rotates the player 90 degrees to the right.
      Parameter:
      player - the player
